warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Cossack Squats
5 Tempo Banded Squats
15 Empty Bar Squats

strength.name: Back Squat
strength.description:
4x3 | *Shoulder blades to back pocket
*Ribcage to pelvis
*Screw feet out into floor | E3MOM 21min
BUILD 3 Sets
00:00 5 @ 55%
03:00 5 @ 65%
06:00 3 @ 75%
HOLD 4 Sets
09:00 3 @ 85%
12:00 3 @ 85%
15:00 3 @ 85%
18:00 3 @ 85%

strength.name: Behind The Neck Jerk
strength.description:
1x3 | *Knees out, Keep upright
*Pause in catch
*Bring front foot back first | E2MOM 10min
Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 3
02:00 3
04:00 3
06:00 3
08:00 3

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
15 min AMRAP
8 HSPU
200m run
10 Burpees (control your pace to get straight back to your HSPU)

hypertrophy.reasoning: Back and arms provide antagonist work to pressing/squatting; hamstrings support recovery without competing CNS fatigue.
suggested_exercises: Nordic curls or lying hamstring curls: 3x6-8

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Back Squat, 4 by 3 at 85 percent. Strength: Behind The Neck Jerk, 1 by 3. Metcon: AMRAP 15 minutes: 8 HSPU, 200m run, 10 Burpees (control your pace to get straight back to your HSPU). For hypertrophy, focus on back (lats), hamstrings, arms (biceps/triceps).
